channel.title: Code4it.dev on .NET Ramblings
channel.description: Recent content in Code4it.dev on .NET Ramblings

item.title: How to send Slack messages using Azure Logic Apps: built-in connector vs Slack APIs
item.description: As you may know, you can send Slack notifications using Azure Logic Apps. Yes, there is a built-in connector; but, frankly, using the Slack API gives you better results. Link to article: https://www.code4it.dev/blog/send-slack-messages-using-azure-logic-apps/
